entries.title: Promotion tick idempotency: near-threshold pair oscillation must be explicitly specified
UDS Observation Log: operator-togglable debug visibility via unimatrix_server::obs target
GRAPH_EDGES tick writes: use write_pool_server() directly; insert between orphaned-edge compaction and TypedGraphState rebuild
contradiction scan O(N) ONNX cost: cache in ContradictionScanCache, tick writes every 4th tick, context_status reads cache
Lazy-loading ONNX service handle: generalized state machine for any optional inference provider
